name: mli-paper-reading-skill
description: Academic paper reading skill inspired by Li Mu's three-pass method — triage, content mapping, evidence critique, reproduction planning, and literature survey. Outputs a local HTML note with embedded paper figures, MathJax formulas, and Mermaid diagrams.

plugins.name: mli-paper-reading-skill
plugins.description: Academic paper reading skill inspired by Li Mu's three-pass method. Triage papers, map content, critique evidence, plan reproduction, compare papers, and build literature maps.
